creator: empty.japan
caption:
Who would’ve thought Nagano had this many farmers markets? There were some in Kyoto too, but here they’re on every corner. 

I’m thinking of making a video comparing farmers market and supermarket prices - overall, I feel like fruits and veggies are much cheaper at the market, especially when they’re in peak season.
